items: Roll Call
Report Out on Closed Session from January 10, 2025
Welcome by the School Board President, Mike Wells
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda
Approval of Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Orion Alternative School Presentation for the 2024-2025 School Year
Public Hearing regarding the Connect Community Charter School Renewal Petition
Approval of Consent Items
Approval of the December 11 Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of the December 17 Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and Consultant William Gomez for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of 2024 School Accountability Report Cards (SARCs)
Adoption of Resolution No. 15, Resolution to Apply for Zero-Emission School Bus Incentive, ZESBI
Acceptance of California School Employees Association Chapter V Sunshine Proposal for 2024-25 & 2025-26
Governing Board's Receipt of Initial Proposal for Negotiations with the California School Employees Association, Chapter V, for 2024-25 & 2025-26
Approval of Personnel Changes for 2024-2025 school year
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Quarterly Williams Report, 2nd Quarter, October 2024 through December 2024
Recommendation for Mathematics Curriculum Adoption for Grades 6-8
Correspondence
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar
Adjourn the Meeting

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Two changes announced during 'Changes to the Agenda': (1) Item 8.5 (Approval of 2024 School Accountability Report Cards) pulled due to errors in data; (2) Item 11.2 (Mathematics Curriculum Adoption for Grades 6-8) moved up to follow item 6.1 (Orion presentation) and before item 7.1 (Connect Charter renewal hearing)
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I move we approve and a second okay all those in favor I I
